findings.title: Overly permissive CORS configuration with any origin and credentials
findings.description: Actix-web CORS configured with allow_any_origin(), allow_any_method(), allow_any_header(), and supports_credentials()

findings.title: XML parsing without entity restrictions or DTD rejection
findings.description: roxmltree parses user-supplied XML without explicit DTD rejection, creating latent XXE risk if library is changed

findings.title: Unrestricted settings modification without authentication
findings.description: PUT /api/settings allows any unauthenticated user to modify security-critical application settings

findings.title: Diagnostics endpoint exposes database credentials
findings.description: Admin diagnostics returns database host, username, and password in JSON response

findings.title: Environment variables exposed via admin endpoint
findings.description: Admin env endpoint returns all environment variables via std::env::vars() in JSON response
